overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a white coat walking through an industrial space station or facility corridor. The environment features exposed metal piping, artificial lighting, and scattered NPCs. The camera smoothly follows the character as they navigate from a narrow passage into a wider concourse area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with overhead piping

events.description: character begins walking forward from stationary position near the wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the corridor wall past industrial piping and a stationary guard

notable_agents.action: heavily armored guard standing at attention against the wall holding a rifle

entered.detail: thick metal piping running vertically along the corridor wall with valve wheels
riveted metal sheet walls with industrial finish and dark lower panels
large rolling metal security door with warning stripes
painted safety lines on the metal floor marking walkways

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial corridor with the character standing near an armored guard. As the character starts walking, they move past large industrial pipes running along the right wall. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting, featuring metal wall panels and a corrugated security door visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial concourse with machinery and worker activity

events.description: corridor opens into wider industrial concourse with visible machinery and multiple workers
character navigates around standing workers while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: navigating through the busier concourse area passing workers and industrial equipment

notable_agents.action: worker in white shirt standing with hands on hips observing the area
civilian walking in same direction ahead through the concourse

entered.detail: stacked cargo containers and cardboard boxes along the left wall
illuminated information board mounted on the wall displaying text
large equipment and machinery with pipes occupying the center area
exposed structural beams and overhead piping visible in the upper area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a wider industrial concourse with more open space and increased activity. The character walks past industrial crates and machinery while navigating around other workers. Digital signage and exposed ceiling girders become visible as the large pipes from the previous corridor section fall behind. The environment maintains its industrial aesthetic with metal flooring and artificial lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped industrial corridor that gradually opens into a bustling facility concourse. It begins in a narrow passage where the character stands near an armored guard, moving forward past large industrial pipes and metal wall panels under dim artificial lighting. As the character advances toward a distant corrugated security door, the space expands into a wider concourse filled with industrial crates and machinery. The scene then shifts to a more active environment, navigating around workers while the previous piping falls behind to reveal digital signage and exposed ceiling girders. The movement concludes within this open industrial hub, maintaining a consistent aesthetic of metal flooring and artificial light.
